about.label: 01. ABOUT

about.p1: I'm a NoCode/LowCode developer and official ibe.IA platform member, focused on smart automations that connect support, internal processes, and AI tools.
about.p2: I work with n8n, Make, Cursor, and WhatsApp integrations to turn manual routines into reliable flows, with clarity, performance, and measurable outcomes.
